genre_refs: 'Bus window view' / 'Optimist vs Pessimist on the bus' cartoon meme (artist Genildo Ronchi)
description: Cartoon illustration (signed 'Genildo' at bottom right) of the interior of a bus with two passengers. On the left, a gray-faced man in a purple shirt slumps in his seat, looking at a window that shows a gray rock wall; white block capitals caption him 'FUNDING UZBEKISTAN'S COTTON INDUSTRY.' On the right, a smiling man in an orange-red shirt sits upright looking out his window at a landscape of green hills, a winding river, and a sunset; he is captioned 'INVESTING IN AMERICAN WORKERS.'
notable_text: FUNDING UZBEKISTAN'S COTTON INDUSTRY | INVESTING IN AMERICAN WORKERS
